microsoft_ft: **Scaled Azure's recovery validation program** end to end — grew a 2-person operation into a platformized motion, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 delivery** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that cut operational toil by 30% and transitioned a manual program into a repeatable, scalable execution model.

Directed 14 high-visibility cross-org recovery executions — including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract** — keeping stakeholders aligned and operations running flawlessly under executive scrutiny.

Built an internal AI agent and restructured planning workflows to reduce **program planning cycle time by 39%** and increase drill capacity by 21%, demonstrating the kind of process-design and automation leverage this role demands.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level drill program, delivering in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate** — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new repeatable model for continuous enterprise validation.
microsoft_2023: **Drove feature adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows by running demos and training sessions across 14 Azure service teams, saving 37 engineering hours monthly and translating technical product value into clear, compelling programming for practitioners.

Defined the product roadmap case for intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ discovery interviews** with enterprise service teams, identifying critical gaps and surfacing insights that directly shaped prioritization decisions.

Improved documentation retrieval by migrating to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% and demonstrating strong instincts for process design and operational rigor.
microsoft_2022: **Generated $3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, coordinating buy-in across 140+ teams in a complex, matrixed stakeholder environment.

Ran end-to-end discovery with 20+ service teams to map **81 hours of manual toil per region launch**, then built a roadmap to automate critical paths — mirroring the program-building and process-design motion central to this role.

Engineered a **Power BI reporting dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership the visibility needed to target automation gaps and make high-leverage prioritization decisions.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by owning the legacy OS migration strategy end to end — mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and keeping cross-functional partners aligned throughout execution.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, **resolving 40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process through disciplined backlog prioritization and stakeholder coordination.

Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and building the repeatable operating system behind a complex cross-org program.
pro_painters: **Increased job bookings by 26%** by managing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a new CRM process that improved lead routing, follow-up speed, and conversion across the sales pipeline.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by 13% and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a **digital-first go-to-market strategy** — optimizing the website and Google profile to drive qualified audience engagement and demand generation.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and translating operational data into actionable program improvements.

skills_priority: Program Management (end-to-end program ownership, stakeholder alignment, cross-functional execution)
Demand Generation & Pipeline Programs (lead routing, follow-up workflows, conversion tracking)

Process Design & Operational Excellence (repeatable playbooks, templates, reporting, calendar management)
AI & Automation (AI agents, workflow automation, LLM-powered tools, semantic search)

Enterprise Audience Enablement (B2B SaaS, technical/developer-adjacent audiences)
Data & Reporting (Power BI, SQL, success metrics, program ROI)
tailoring_notes: 'end-to-end ownership' (JD core phrase) woven into microsoft_ft bullet 1 and amazon_robotics bullet 1 to mirror the JD's high-agency operator framing.
'lead routing and follow-up' (JD: 'drive lead management and follow-up') surfaced explicitly in pro_painters bullet 1 to map CRM ops experience to the pipeline-generation success metric.
'repeatable operating system' (JD: 'build the operating system behind the programs') used in amazon_robotics bullet 3 and microsoft_2023 bullet 3 to signal process-design instincts.
'demand generation' and 'pipeline influence' (JD success metrics) reflected in skills_priority and pro_painters framing to align with B2B SaaS demand gen experience requirement.

'enterprise audience enablement' and 'translating product value into compelling programming' (JD: 'educate prospects and customers, drive adoption') woven into microsoft_2023 bullet 1 to surface technical-to-audience translation skill.
